quote: Talon didn't just shoot our film — they understood the story we were trying to tell before we could articulate it ourselves.
name: Priya Narayan

quote: The cyclorama studio is genuinely the best-kept secret in Bengaluru. Professional grade space, fair rates, no surprises.
name: Arjun Mehta

quote: Every frame they delivered had a finishing quality you rarely see at this budget level. Craft-first isn't just a tagline here.
name: Sneha Kulkarni

quote: We've rented studio floors across the city. Nothing comes close to this setup — the cyclorama, the power, the ease of it.
name: Kiran Desai

quote: The color grading alone transformed our project. What came back felt like a different film — in the best way possible.
name: Rohan Kapoor

quote: Three shoots in six months, zero production headaches. That says everything about how they run their floor.
name: Meera Shah

quote: They treated our small commercial with the same seriousness as a feature. No hierarchy of projects — just good work.
name: Vikram Iyer

quote: The team's attention to sound design elevated our documentary beyond anything we'd imagined during pre-production.
name: Ananya Rao

quote: Fair rates, transparent billing, and actual craft. In this industry, finding all three in one place is genuinely rare.
name: Siddharth Menon

quote: We came in for a half-day studio rental and left with a production partner. That's the Talon difference.
name: Deepa Krishnan

quote: Their cinematography team has an intuition for natural light that you can't teach. Every setup felt intentional.
name: Rahul Bhat

quote: Post-production was seamless. Edits, grade, sound — all under one roof, all on schedule. That never happens.
name: Nisha Reddy
